hypothesis: If GFN1-xTB semi-empirical band gaps are used as a physically informed baseline in a ∆-learning framework with XGBoost, then the resulting model will predict DFT-level (PBE and HSE06) band gaps for metal-organic frameworks more accurately than direct machine learning models trained on structural descriptors alone, because the systematic errors between GFN1-xTB and DFT band gaps are more learnable patterns than the absolute band gap values themselves.
